title: mmpviz theme.json
description: Visual styling for the mmpviz renderer. Themes are reusable across different diagrams.

schema_version.description: Theme file format generation. Current value: 1.

extends.description: Built-in theme name ('default', 'plantuml') or path to inherit from.

base.description: Global baseline styles applied to all views and sections. View and section overrides build on top of this.

views.description: Per-view style overrides. Keys are view IDs from diagram.json.

links.description: Style for cross-view zoom band connectors.

labels.description: Style for address annotation labels (leader lines and text).

growth_arrow.description: Style for grows-up/grows-down arrow indicators on sections.

color_string.description: Any valid SVG color: named ('white'), hex ('#caf0f8'), rgb('rgb(33,43,56)'), or 'none'.

base_props.description: All visual style properties. Used as a mixin via allOf.

break_fill.description: Background fill of a break-section box. Falls back to 'fill' when unset.

stroke.description: Outline color for boxes and frames.

stroke_dasharray.description: SVG dash pattern (e.g. '5,3'). Use 'none' for a solid outline.

font_size.description: Font size in pixels. Use 12–14 for screen/print, 15–18 for projected slides.

text_fill.description: Text color for the section name label inside the box. Address labels outside the box use the view-level value.

break_height.description: Fixed height in pixels of a break section.

min_section_height.description: Minimum pixel height for every visible section. Set to null for pure proportional rendering.

max_section_height.description: Maximum pixel height for any single section.

base_block.description: Style properties block with no extra keys allowed.

view_override.description: Style overrides for a single view panel. Accepts all style properties plus 'sections' and 'labels' maps.

sections.description: Per-section style overrides within this view. Keys are section IDs from diagram.json.

labels.description: Per-label style overrides within this view. Keys are label IDs from diagram.json.

seg_height.description: Span selector for a segment edge. 'source' = from.sections pixel span; 'destination' = to.sections pixel span; a non-negative number = literal pixel span (0 collapses the edge to a point). The vertical center is fixed by segment position; sheight/dheight only control the band width at that edge.

connector_block.description: Connector-style link: two trapezoidal ends joined by a center line. The source trapezoid widens from the middle-line width to the source region span; the destination trapezoid narrows from the destination region span back to the line width.

width.description: Horizontal extent in pixels of the source trapezoid.
Horizontal extent in pixels of the destination trapezoid.

middle.description: Middle line connecting the two trapezoids.

width.description: Stroke width in pixels of the middle line.

shape.description: 'curve' draws a cubic Bézier S-curve (line cap: butt); 'straight' draws a direct line (line cap: round).

fill.description: Color applied to both trapezoid fills and the middle line stroke.

band_seg_shape.description: Segment edge shape for band mode. 'straight' uses straight lines; 'curve' uses cubic Bézier curves.

band_block.description: Band-style link: three independently shaped segments (source outreach, middle span, destination outreach) with full fill/stroke control.

shape.description: Edge shape of the source segment.

width.description: Width in pixels of the source outreach. 0 = no outreach.

shape.description: Edge shape of the middle segment.

sheight.description: Height at the source-side edge of the middle segment.

dheight.description: Height at the destination-side edge of the middle segment.

shape.description: Edge shape of the destination segment.

width.description: Width in pixels of the destination outreach. 0 = no outreach.

fill.description: Fill color for the band interior. Use 'none' for stroke-only.

stroke.description: Stroke color for the band edges. Use 'none' for fill-only.

stroke_dasharray.description: SVG dash pattern for band edges, e.g. '8,4'.

growth_arrow_block.description: Style for the grows-up/grows-down arrow indicators on flagged sections.

link_style_override_block.description: Per-link visual overrides keyed by link id in links.overrides. Applied on top of the global connector/band style.

stroke_width.description: Override stroke width in pixels (band mode only).

stroke_dasharray.description: Override SVG dash pattern (band mode only).

labels_block.description: Style for address annotation labels: leader lines, arrow heads, and text.

stroke_dasharray.description: SVG dash pattern for the leader line, e.g. '4,2'.

font_size.description: Label text font size in pixels.

links_block.description: Style for cross-view zoom band connectors. Define 'connector' (recommended) or 'band', plus optional per-link overrides under 'overrides'.

overrides.description: Per-link style overrides. Keys are link ids from diagram.json.
